title: Finality of decision
doc_html:
§1393.  Finality of decision

The decision of the division shall be final in any matter arising under this Chapter.

Amended by Acts 1974, No. 294, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 29:464 by Acts 1991, No. 74, §3, eff. June 25, 1991.

§1393.  Finality of decision
The decision of the division shall be final in any matter arising under this Chapter.
Amended by Acts 1974, No. 294, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 29:464 by Acts 1991, No. 74, §3, eff. June 25, 1991.
